title: Taliban Rare Earth Minerals Sanctions Act
short_title: Taliban Rare Earth Minerals Sanctions Act
plain_summary: This law makes the President punish foreign people and companies that do business with Afghanistan's rare earth mineral industry. Rare earth minerals are special materials used to make electronics and other important products. The punishments include taking away their money and property in the United States and not letting them come into the country. These punishments will start six months after the law is passed.
last_action_text: Referred to the Committee on Foreign Affairs, and in addition to the Committee on the Judiciary, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provi

sections.title: Section 1 Short Title
sections.text: This law can be called the Taliban Rare Earth Minerals Sanctions Act.

sections.title: Section 2 Imposition of Sanctions on Persons Engaging in Transactions in Afghanistan Rare Earth Minerals
sections.text: Starting one hundred eighty days after this law is passed, the President must punish foreign people or companies if they do business with Afghanistan's rare earth mineral industry. Rare earth minerals are special metals used to make electronics and other products. The President can only punish them if they knowingly do important business deals with people who work in or help Afghanistan's rare earth mineral business. However, this law does not allow the President to punish people just for bringing goods into the United States. Goods means any items, materials, or products that are made or found naturally, but not technical information. If someone breaks this law or tries to break it, they will face the same punishments listed in the International Emergency Economic Powers Act. The punishments include two main things. First, the President will freeze all money and property that the punished person owns in the United States or that comes under control of Americans. Second, if the punished person is a foreign citizen, they cannot get a visa to visit the United States and will be kept out of the country.
